page.title: Carnival at Sea: Marbella Yacht Charter for a Festive Day

data.meta_description: Celebrate Carnival with a yacht charter in Marbella. Depart Puerto Banús from €749/2h. Licensed skipper, drinks & snacks included. Book your festive day now.
data.summary: Celebrate Carnival in style with a yacht charter from Puerto Banús, Marbella. Our fleet offers festive day trips with included skipper, drinks, and snacks from €749/2h.
key_facts: Carnival yacht charter Marbella from €749/2h (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39).
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and Spanish IVA.
Free drinks: water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, plus light snacks.
Mangusta 80 (24m) includes a free jet ski for 4h+ bookings from €4,719.
Depart from Puerto Banús; explore Marbella coast, Cabopino, or Estepona.
Maximum 12 guests on larger yachts; 5–11 pax on smaller boats.
Book via WhatsApp for custom durations and boat options.

faq.q: What is included in a Carnival yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, and Spanish IVA (21%). Just bring your costume and enjoy.

faq.q: How much does a Carnival yacht charter cost?
faq.a: Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours and go up to €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B (Mangusta 80) costs €4,719 minimum 4 hours and includes a free jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Which yachts are best for a Carnival party?
faq.a: For larger groups, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) or Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) offer plenty of deck space. For smaller parties, the Azimut 39 (11 pax) or Astondoa 40 (9 pax) are great value.

faq.q: Can I bring my own decorations or music for Carnival?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring decorations and a speaker for music. Our yachts have sound systems, but confirm specifics when booking. Keep decorations safe and avoid anything that could damage surfaces.

faq.q: Where do Carnival yacht charters depart from?
faq.a: All charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. This iconic marina is easy to reach and offers parking nearby. We can also arrange pickups from Marbella Marina or Cabopino on request.

faq.q: What is the best route for a Carnival day at sea?
faq.a: A popular route heads east past the Golden Mile to Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés for swimming. Alternatively, cruise west to Estepona or Sotogrande. Your skipper can tailor the itinerary to your group.

faq.q: How far in advance should I book a Carnival yacht?
faq.a: Carnival dates can be busy, especially for larger yachts. We recommend booking at least 2–3 weeks ahead. Last-minute availability may exist for smaller boats. Contact us via WhatsApp to check.

faq.q: Is the skipper included in the Carnival charter price?
faq.a: Yes, a licensed skipper is included in all our charters at no extra cost. They handle navigation and safety, so you can relax and celebrate. No boating license needed.

data.body_html:
Celebrate Carnival in Marbella with a yacht charter that combines the best of the Costa del Sol with a festive day on the water. Departing from Puerto Banús, our fleet offers everything from intimate speedboats to superyachts, all with a licensed skipper, drinks, and snacks included. Whether you want a short 2-hour blast or an 8-hour cruise with a jet ski, a Carnival yacht charter in Marbella is a memorable way to mark the occasion.

Why choose a Carnival yacht charter in Marbella?

Marbella's Carnival falls in February or March, when temperatures hover around 16–20 °C. A yacht charter lets you escape the crowds while still enjoying the party spirit. You get private access to the coast, with stops for swimming at coves like Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés. Unlike a beach or bar, your yacht is a mobile venue: you control the music, the itinerary, and the vibe. And because everything is included — skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks — there are no hidden costs.

Our Carnival fleet: boats for every group size

We have 17 boats based in Puerto Banús, covering groups from 5 to 12 guests. Here are the best options for a Carnival celebration:

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) — €749/2h to €2,299/8h. Ideal for a small group wanting value.
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) — same pricing. More space for one extra guest.
  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) — from €4,719 minimum 4h, includes a free jet ski. Perfect for a party.
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) — premium option. Pricing on request via WhatsApp.
  • Speedboat (7m, 6 pax) — for a quicker, more agile outing. Pricing on request.

See all options on our Marbella yacht charter page.

What’s included in your Carnival charter?

Every booking comes with:

  • Licensed skipper (no license needed)
  • Fuel for the full duration
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks (chips, nuts, olives)
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%)

You only need to bring your costume, sunscreen, and a sense of fun.

Suggested Carnival itinerary from Puerto Banús

A typical 4-hour Carnival cruise might head east along the Golden Mile, past Marbella Marina, to the cliffs of Cala del Faro. Drop anchor for a swim, enjoy drinks on the foredeck, then cruise back past the La Concha mountain backdrop. For a longer day, continue to Cabopino or cross to Estepona. Your skipper knows the best spots and can adapt to weather and group preferences. For a full-day adventure, consider the Mangusta 80 with its included jet ski for extra thrills.

Pricing and booking for Carnival

Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) are the most affordable Carnival option: €749 for 2 hours, €1,149 for 3 hours, €1,799 for 5 hours, or €2,299 for 8 hours. All include skipper, drinks, and snacks. The Mangusta 80 (white or grey) starts at €4,719 for 4 hours and includes a jet ski. Other boats like the Ferretti 94 or Azimut 58 Flybridge are priced on request — simply contact us via WhatsApp for a quote.

Tips for a successful Carnival yacht party

  • Book early — Carnival dates fill up, especially for larger yachts.
  • Bring costumes and props, but avoid heavy glitter or confetti that might be hard to clean.
  • Check the weather: February sea temperatures are around 15 °C, so a wetsuit or a towel is wise if swimming.
  • Arrive 15 minutes before departure at Puerto Banús.
  • Let us know if you need catering upgrades (tapas, paella, champagne) — we can arrange at extra cost.

Other ways to celebrate Carnival in Marbella

If you’re staying on land, Marbella’s Carnival parade runs along the Golden Mile and through the old town. But for a truly unique experience, nothing beats a Carnival yacht charter Marbella. Combine a morning at sea with an afternoon in the old town, or spend the whole day cruising from Puerto Banús to Sotogrande and back.

Frequently asked questions

What is included in a Carnival yacht charter in Marbella?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, and Spanish IVA (21%). Just bring your costume and enjoy.

How much does a Carnival yacht charter cost?

Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours and go up to €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B (Mangusta 80) costs €4,719 minimum 4 hours and includes a free jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

Which yachts are best for a Carnival party?

For larger groups, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) or Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) offer plenty of deck space. For smaller parties, the Azimut 39 (11 pax) or Astondoa 40 (9 pax) are great value.

Can I bring my own decorations or music for Carnival?

Yes, you are welcome to bring decorations and a speaker for music. Our yachts have sound systems, but confirm specifics when booking. Keep decorations safe and avoid anything that could damage surfaces.

Where do Carnival yacht charters depart from?

All charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. This iconic marina is easy to reach and offers parking nearby. We can also arrange pickups from Marbella Marina or Cabopino on request.

What is the best route for a Carnival day at sea?

A popular route heads east past the Golden Mile to Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés for swimming. Alternatively, cruise west to Estepona or Sotogrande. Your skipper can tailor the itinerary to your group.

How far in advance should I book a Carnival yacht?

Carnival dates can be busy, especially for larger yachts. We recommend booking at least 2–3 weeks ahead. Last-minute availability may exist for smaller boats. Contact us via WhatsApp to check.

Is the skipper included in the Carnival charter price?

Yes, a licensed skipper is included in all our charters at no extra cost. They handle navigation and safety, so you can relax and celebrate. No boating license needed.
